lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so jeevan mukataa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is Jivan-mukta, liberated while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so seetal hooaa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart becomes cool and calm.
Without the Naam, both life and death are cursed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਭ ਹੀ ਜੁਗਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis sabh hee jugataa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart knows all ways and means.
Without the Naam, the mortal wanders, coming and going in reincarnation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਨਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tin nau nidh paaee |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart obtains the nine treasures.
One who keeps the Naam in his heart is carefree and independent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਲਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis sad hee laahaa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart always earns a profit.
Without the Naam, the mortal is just an ignorant, self-willed manmukh. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਵਡ ਪਰਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis vadd paravaaraa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart has a large family.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਆਸਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis nihachal aasan |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart has a permanent position.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਖਤਿ ਨਿਵਾਸਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis takhat nivaasan |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is seated on the throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so saachaa saahu |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is the true king.
Without the Naam, no one has any honor or respect. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so sabh meh jaataa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is famous everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so sabh te aoochaa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is the highest of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so purakh bidhaataa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is the Embodiment of the Creator Lord.
Without the Naam, the mortal wanders in reincarnation. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਅੰਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis mittiaa andhaaraa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart - his darkness is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿ ਪਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis pragatt pahaaraa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart sees the Lord manifested in His Creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai so purakh paravaan |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart is approved and accepted.
Without the Naam, the mortal continues coming and going in reincarnation. ||7||
Coming and going in reincarnation ends, and peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਇਓ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: tin naam paaeaa jis bheo kripaal |
lines.english: He alone receives the Naam, who is blessed by the Lord's Mercy.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Lord of the World is understood.
He created millions of incarnations of Vishnu.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, my essence has merged in the Essence of the Lord. ||8||1||4||
Such is my Lord and Master, the Lord of the Universe.
He created and destroyed millions of Shivas.
He created millions of universes as places to practice righteousness.
He employed millions of Brahmas to create the worlds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਨਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਗੁਣ ਬਿਸਥਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baran na saakau gun bisathaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I cannot even describe His Many Virtues. ||1||Pause||
Millions of Mayas are His maid-servants.
Millions of kings with their crowns and canopies bow before Him.
Millions of souls are His beds.
Millions of universes are the limbs of His Being.
Millions of devotees abide with the Lord. ||2||
Millions of Indras stand at His Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਨਾਮ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kott naam jaa kee keemat naeh |3|
lines.english: Millions of His Names cannot even be appraised. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਬੈਕੁੰਠ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kott baikuntth jaa kee drisattee maeh |
lines.english: Millions of heavenly paradises are within the scope of His Vision.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਪੂਰੀਅਤ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਨਾਦ ॥
lines.translit: kott pooreeat hai jaa kai naad |
lines.english: Millions of celestial sounds resound for Him.
Millions of Shaktis and Shivas are obedient to Him.
His Wondrous Plays are enacted on millions of stages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਮਝਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kott teerath jaa ke charan majhaar |
lines.english: In His Feet are millions of sacred shrines of pilgrimage.
He gives sustenance and support to millions of beings. ||4||
Millions chant His Sacred and Beautiful Name.
Millions of worshippers worship Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੰਸ ॥
lines.translit: kott mahimaa jaa kee niramal hans |
lines.english: Millions of swan-souls sing His Immaculate Praises.
Millions of expanses are His; there is no other at all. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਗੁਣਾ ਤੇਰੇ ਗਣੇ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kott gunaa tere gane na jaeh |6|
lines.english: Millions are Your Virtues, Lord - they cannot even be counted. ||6||
He creates and destroys millions, in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਕਰਤ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਸ ॥
lines.translit: kott usatat jaa kee karat brahamans |
lines.english: Millions of Brahma's sons sing His Praises.
Millions of austere penitents practice austerities.
Millions of spiritual teachers teach His spiritual wisdom.
Millions of meditators focus on His meditation.
